_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS.md (brain -> skills -> 14-param -> modules/canonical -> principles -> unit+browser tests -> verify)
_meta.scope: write detail panels — slice 1: onboarding document register + review (config-driven, generalizable)

title: Write detail panels: register + review a child sub-collection (onboarding documents)
business_reason: Detail panels (FR-0003) were read-only. A reviewer must register a required document on a case and approve/reject it in context. This adds opt-in WRITE panels (add + review) on top of the read-only mechanism, starting with onboarding documents.
brain_skills: Brain: complete = can add + decide in context with audit, not just view. Skills: 03 Screen Contract, 05 API Contract, 09 Audit/Idempotency, 08 Security (masking + mass-assignment), 10 File Storage (file BYTES deferred — storage not wired).

param_14.question: Let a parent panel ADD a child and REVIEW it (status decision) in-screen, audited.
param_14.answer: Kernel helpers addChildRecord (insert fk + allowed fields + server actor/defaults; mass-assignment-safe; masked; audited) and reviewChildRecord (update editable fields + stamp reviewer/reviewed_at; audited with before-snapshot). A WRITE_PANELS registry (_detail_panels.py) opts a child table in with addFields/addRequired/addAllowed/actorColumn/defaults + a review {editable, reviewerColumn, reviewedAtColumn, editFields}. gen_modules emits POST on the panel route + a PATCH [cid] review route; gen_ui emits the panel's addFields/editFields; ModuleTable's existing add+per-item-edit drawer renders them.
param_14.answer_source: migration 0001 CHECK constraints (document_type/review_status real enums) + 0018 (document_file/uploaded_by nullable) + CANONICAL_DATA_MODEL.json
param_14.security_implications: POST/PATCH are staff-write guarded; only declared addAllowed/editable fields are written (server sets uploaded_by/reviewed_by + defaults — client cannot forge them); rows masked on read; reason/before-snapshot audited.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: WRITE_PANELS is the opt-in mechanism for other child tables (e.g. finance adjustments, roster corrections). File BYTES upload needs storage (deferred).
param_14.assumptions: document_type/review_status values come from the migration CHECK constraints (canonical lacked enum_values); file attach deferred.

principles_pass.P0.6: generic addChildRecord/reviewChildRecord + WRITE_PANELS registry; any child opts in via config
principles_pass.P3.9: mass-assignment-safe (only allowed/editable fields; server sets actor + defaults)
principles_pass.P2.2: enum values taken from the real CHECK constraints (not guessed)

functional: addChildRecord writes fk + allowed + server actor/defaults, ignores non-allowed, requires required
reviewChildRecord updates editable + stamps reviewer/time + audits + not-found rejects
browser: register a document then review (accept) in-screen
security_owasp: A08: client review_status/id on add ignored (server default/allowed only)
followup: file BYTES upload (needs private storage + signed URLs)
opt-in more child tables into WRITE_PANELS

verification: tsc clean; unit child_write 4/4 (151 total); browser journey 06_onboarding_doc_write (register school_id_proof + review accepted) green; drift OK.
